allow: Bash(python -c "import torch; print\(f'PyTorch {torch.__version__}'\); print\(f'CUDA available: {torch.cuda.is_available\(\)}'\); print\(f'CUDA version: {torch.version.cuda}' if torch.cuda.is_available\(\) else 'No CUDA'\)" 2>&1)
Bash(sleep 2 && curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:8501/ && curl -s http://localhost:8501/api/status | python -m json.tool 2>&1 | head -20)

Bash(cd E:/Projects/football_highligter && python -c "
import dashboard
import json
status = dashboard.parse_training_log\(\)
print\(json.dumps\(status, indent=2\)[:500]\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(cd E:/Projects/football_highligter && python -c "
import dashboard, json
status = dashboard.parse_training_log\(\)
print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in status.items\(\) if k != 'log_lines'}, indent=2\)\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(sleep 2 && curl -s http://localhost:8501/api/status 2>&1 | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(json.dumps\({k:v for k,v in d.items\(\) if k!='log_lines'},indent=2\)\)")
Bash(curl -s http://localhost:8501/api/status 2>&1 | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); [d.pop\('log_lines',None\)]; print\(json.dumps\(d,indent=2\)\)")
